expectations.evidence: Output covers Phase 0 (prerequisites), Phase 1 (Okta MCP credentials), Phase 2 (My Domain check), Phase 3 (Okta app creation), Phase 4 (SAML config in Salesforce), Phase 5 (SCIM provisioning), Phase 6 (assign users + verify). All phases present and labeled.
Phase 1 explicitly calls 'mcp__demo-okta__get_tenant_management_credentials(demoName: "deel-oig-poc")' and explains extracting the Okta domain from the discoveryUrl.

Multiple $B goto commands throughout: '$B goto "...lightning/setup/OrgDomain/home"', '$B goto "...admin/apps/active"', '$B goto "...SingleSignOn/home"', '$B goto "...ManageUsers/home"', plus $B screenshot commands.
Phase 4 table clearly shows 'Entity ID: https://saml.salesforce.com'
Phase 5 attribute mappings table includes 'user.email → FederationIdentifier (Required for SSO linkage)' and notes 'If FederationIdentifier is missing, add it manually.'
Ends with '## Salesforce Integration Complete ✅' block covering SSO (SAML 2.0) and Provisioning (SCIM) sections with test results and demo script notes.

Phase 6 includes 'Test Deprovisioning (OIG money shot)' section. Demo Script Notes explicitly list 'Remove assignment → show user deactivated in Salesforce (OIG lifecycle management)' and 'Pair with OIG: run access certification with Salesforce as governed app.'
